name: texture-card
description: Card component with texture background and customizable styling options

registry_item.name: texture-card
registry_item.description: Card component with texture background and customizable styling options

visual_summary: A textured card component with a layered aesthetic structure for visual interest. Usage would include presenting information or highlighting a particular section. It's suitable for various application use cases where showcasing content is necessary in an elegant and visually appealing manner.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: texture-card
Description: A textured card component with a layered aesthetic structure for visual interest. Usage would include presenting information or highlighting a particular section. It's suitable for various application use cases where showcasing content is necessary in an elegant and visually appealing manner.
Style: e.g. dark, elegant, aesthetic
Interactions: e.g. clickable, interactive
Tags: card, nested, layered

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

  HTMLDivElement,
  React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> & { children?: React.ReactNode }
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <div
    ref={ref}
    className={cn(
      "rounded-[24px] border border-white/60 dark:border-stone-950/60",
      "bg-gradient-to-b dark:from-neutral-800 dark:to-neutral-900 from-neutral-100 to-white/70",
